meta.title: Wif-Me | Umrah Worship Companion Platform
meta.description: A multi-service marketplace for personal muthawif, muthawif providers, transportation, visa processing, and supporting services for independent Umrah pilgrims.

hero.description: Wif-Me connects independent Umrah pilgrims with personal muthawif, providers, route-based transportation, visa processing, and supporting services in a verified ecosystem.

searchBox.title: Which service do you want to prepare?
searchBox.description: Choose a starting point. Trip details can be completed in the next step.
searchBox.label: Service type
searchBox.note: No registration fee. Payment is processed when booking.

services.title: Wif-Me core business in one journey flow.
services.description: Each service can stand alone, but they are designed to connect so worship preparation stays organized.

items.title: Personal Muthawif
items.desc: Book a verified individual worship guide for independent pilgrims, families, or small groups.

items.title: Muthawif Provider
items.desc: B2B cooperation for travel agencies, communities, and organizations that need reliable muthawif supply.

items.title: Transportation
items.desc: Route-based vehicle rental for airports, Makkah, Madinah, ziyarat, and intercity travel.

items.title: Visa Processing
items.desc: Umrah visa and supporting document handling with trackable process status.

workflow.title: A companion platform that keeps pilgrim and provider flows clear.
workflow.description: From service selection to transaction completion, every process is made easy to track.

items.title: Choose services
items.desc: Define your needs: muthawif, provider, transportation, visa, or additional services.

items.title: Compare providers
items.desc: Review profiles, experience, prices, display currency, and schedule availability.

items.title: Book & escrow
items.desc: Orders are processed with secure payment and trackable service status.

about.title: Built for a verified worship ecosystem.
about.description: Wif-Me is not only a place to find a muthawif. It acts as an intermediary between pilgrims, muthawif, providers, and admins to make worship assistance more transparent.
about.verseMeaning: And complete the Hajj and Umrah for Allah.

features.title: Verified Ecosystem
features.desc: Muthawif and providers go through document, experience, and service eligibility checks.

features.title: Escrow Payment
features.desc: Funds are held until services run as agreed, protecting both pilgrims and providers.

features.title: Multi-Currency
features.desc: Prices can be displayed in IDR, SAR, and USD for clearer booking decisions.

features.title: Connected Services
features.desc: Muthawif, transportation, visa, and additional needs can be arranged in one plan.

roles.title: Pilgrim
roles.desc: Find and book worship assistance services safely.

roles.title: Muthawif
roles.desc: Offer personal services, manage schedules, and receive bookings.

roles.title: Provider
roles.desc: Manage B2B services for groups, travel agencies, and organizations.

join.title: Start as a pilgrim, muthawif, or provider
join.description: Choose the role that fits you. Service providers will complete verification before receiving orders.

cards.title: I am a Pilgrim
cards.desc: Find worship assistance, transportation, visa, and additional needs in one platform.

cards.title: I am a Provider
cards.desc: Register your service as a personal muthawif or provider for pilgrims and B2B cooperation.

cta.title: Worship preparation, better organized
cta.description: Arrange independent Umrah service needs from one safe and verified place.

footer.description: A multi-service platform that connects independent Umrah pilgrims with worship assistance service providers.

overview.title: Initial control for services, providers, and escrow.
overview.description: The admin MVP focuses on landing page service categories, muthawif/provider verification, and escrow fund monitoring.

muthawifPersonal.title: Personal Muthawif
muthawifPersonal.desc: Personal companion for independent pilgrims, families, and small groups.

providerMuthawif.title: Muthawif Provider
providerMuthawif.desc: B2B partnership with travel agencies, communities, and organizations.

transportation.title: Transportation
transportation.desc: Fleet and routes for airports, Makkah, Madinah, ziyarat, and intercity trips.

visaProcessing.title: Visa Processing
visaProcessing.desc: Visa and supporting document handling with trackable progress.

additionalServices.title: Additional Services
additionalServices.desc: Supporting needs connected to the main booking.

muthawif.title: Muthawif verification
muthawif.desc: Experience and identity documents are awaiting review.

provider.title: Provider review
provider.desc: Company profiles and service packages need checking.

escrow.title: Release escrow
escrow.desc: Fund release requests are awaiting validation.

services.title: Categories and services selected by pilgrims.
services.description: Admins can manage service categories and the specific service items shown when pilgrims open a category detail.

muthawifPersonal.title: Personal Muthawif
muthawifPersonal.desc: Personal companion for independent pilgrims, families, and small groups.

providerMuthawif.title: Muthawif Provider
providerMuthawif.desc: B2B partnership with travel agencies, communities, and organizations.

transportation.title: Transportation
transportation.desc: Fleet and routes for airports, Makkah, Madinah, ziyarat, and intercity trips.

visaProcessing.title: Visa Processing
visaProcessing.desc: Visa and supporting document handling with trackable progress.

additionalServices.title: Additional Services
additionalServices.desc: Supporting needs connected to the main booking.

categoryTable.title: Service categories
categoryTable.description: The first layer pilgrims choose from the landing page or search.

serviceTable.title: Platform-provided services
serviceTable.description: Detailed items shown after pilgrims open a service category.

personalUmrahBasic.title: Daily Umrah Assistance
personalUmrahBasic.desc: Personal muthawif for tawaf, sai, and dua guidance on the Umrah day.

familyMuthawif.title: Family Assistance
familyMuthawif.desc: Muthawif package for small families with pace adjustments for elders or children.

groupMuthawif.title: Small Group Muthawif
groupMuthawif.desc: Companion for independent groups with a short manasik briefing before worship.

travelMuthawifSupply.title: Travel Muthawif Supply
travelMuthawifSupply.desc: Supplying several muthawif for travel agencies or communities with group schedules.

hotelToHaramShuttle.title: Hotel to Haram Shuttle
hotelToHaramShuttle.desc: Short transport from hotel areas to Masjidil Haram according to pickup point.

airportTransfer.title: Airport Transfer
airportTransfer.desc: Pickup or drop-off from Jeddah/Madinah airport to the pilgrim hotel.

makkahMadinahRoute.title: Makkah–Madinah Route
makkahMadinahRoute.desc: Intercity trip for pilgrims or families with scheduled vehicles.

umrahVisaRegular.title: Regular Umrah Visa
umrahVisaRegular.desc: Umrah visa processing with document checks and process status updates.

documentReview.title: Visa Document Review
documentReview.desc: Initial review of passport, photo, and supporting documents before submission.

wheelchairSupport.title: Wheelchair Support
wheelchairSupport.desc: Mobility assistance for pilgrims who need extra support.

simCardAssistance.title: SIM Card Assistance
simCardAssistance.desc: Help purchasing and activating a local SIM card on arrival in Saudi Arabia.

categoryPage.title: Service categories
categoryPage.description: Manage the category layer pilgrims choose first. Every service detail must be connected to one of these categories.

itemPage.title: Service list
itemPage.description: Manage detailed services shown inside categories, including base price, status, and category relation.

form.title: Display name
form.categoryCreateDescription: Categories become the main tree before pilgrims choose service details.
form.categoryEditDescription: Category changes affect how services are grouped for pilgrims.
form.itemCreateDescription: Every service must choose a category so the catalog relation stays clear.
form.itemEditDescription: Keep category, base price, and service status accurate.

delete.categoryDescription: This action is prepared to delete a category. Make sure no active services still depend on it.
delete.itemDescription: This action is prepared to remove the service from the pilgrim catalog. Booking history should remain stored later.

profile.name: Admin Wif-Me
profile.description: Use this page to maintain admin account security before audit and team access features are expanded.

security.title: Sensitive access
security.desc: Password changes must be server-validated and recorded in audit logs during backend integration.

changePassword.title: Change password
changePassword.desc: Update your password regularly to protect admin panel access.
changePassword.helper: Use at least 12 characters with letters, numbers, and symbols.

login.title: Last login
login.desc: Admin session active from the primary device.

password.title: Password
password.desc: No changes in the last 30 days.

session.title: Active session
session.desc: Device session management will be available in the next phase.

partners.title: Personal muthawif and providers in one queue.
partners.description: Monitor verification status, booking count, and service readiness from individual and organizational providers.

muthawifPage.title: Personal muthawif in the operational queue.
muthawifPage.description: Monitor verification, base city, primary service, and booking performance for personal muthawif.

providerPage.title: Organizational providers and service fleets.
providerPage.description: Manage B2B providers, transportation, and organizations supplying services to the Wif-Me ecosystem.

form.name: Name
form.muthawifCreateDescription: Register a personal muthawif into the admin verification queue.
form.muthawifEditDescription: Update status, base city, and primary service for the personal muthawif.
form.providerCreateDescription: Register an organization that supplies services in partnership with Wif-Me.
form.providerEditDescription: Update status, base city, and primary service for the provider.

delete.title: Delete {name}?
delete.description: This removes the record from the admin operational list. Make sure no verification process or active booking is still running.

escrow.title: Monitor held, reviewed, and released funds.
escrow.description: The escrow MVP shows transaction status across services so admins can supervise booking completion safely.

balance.label: Active escrow balance
balance.note: Simulation amount for MVP dashboard needs.

hold.title: Funds held
hold.desc: Pilgrim payments enter escrow until services run as agreed.

release.title: Verified release
release.desc: Payout is processed after service proof and related confirmations are complete.

refund.title: Controlled refund
refund.desc: Refunds need clear reasons and an admin decision trail.

review.description: Check service proof and booking status before escrow funds are released.
review.title: Escrow review {id}

transactions.title: Transactions across services.
transactions.description: Monitor pilgrim payments from every service before escrow, completion, or refund.

withdrawals.title: Provider fund withdrawals.
withdrawals.description: Review payout requests from muthawif and providers before funds are released.
withdrawals.reviewDescription: Validate account, amount, and service completion status before approving withdrawal.

fees.title: Set commission and operating fees.
fees.description: Configure primary fees that affect platform revenue and provider payouts.

platformCommission.title: Platform commission
platformCommission.desc: Default commission percentage from marketplace services.

providerCommission.title: Provider commission
providerCommission.desc: Special commission for B2B provider cooperation.

withdrawalFee.title: Withdrawal fee
withdrawalFee.desc: Flat fee for each fund withdrawal request.

fees.addDescription: Set fee name, value, and active status.
fees.deleteDescription: Deleted fee rules will no longer be used for new transactions.

charges.title: Set additional charges.
charges.description: Additional charges caused by payment gateway, exchange rates, or priority processing.

currencySpread.title: Currency spread
currencySpread.desc: Small margin for multi-currency exchange-rate risk.

urgentProcessing.title: Priority processing charge
urgentProcessing.desc: Additional fee for urgent documents or services.

charges.addDescription: Set additional charges used in payment or operations.
charges.deleteDescription: Deleted charges will no longer be used for new transactions.

detail.title: Transaction detail {id}
detail.description: Summary of transaction, service, pilgrim, amount, and payment status.

errors.generic: The request could not be processed. Check your data and try again.
errors.network: Network issue. Please try again shortly.

verifyEmail.title: Enter the OTP code.
verifyEmail.description: The verification code has been sent to {email}. Check your inbox or spam folder.

errors.invalid: The OTP code is invalid or expired.
errors.network: Network issue. Please try again shortly.

resetPassword.title: Set a new password.
resetPassword.description: The reset code has been sent to {email}. Enter the OTP and your new password.
resetPassword.passwordPlaceholder: Minimum 8 characters with letters and numbers

errors.invalid: The OTP code or password is not valid yet.
errors.network: Network issue. Please try again shortly.

Services.title: Choose a category, then review available services.
Services.description: Each category contains service details pilgrims can compare before booking.

muthawifPersonal.title: Personal Muthawif
muthawifPersonal.desc: Personal companion for independent pilgrims, families, and small groups.
muthawifPersonal.detail: Worship assistance by personal muthawif that can follow pilgrim conditions, schedule, and guidance needs.

providerMuthawif.detail: Muthawif supply for travel agencies or groups that need guide quantity, scheduling, and service standards to be more structured.

transportation.desc: Fleet and routes for airports, Makkah, Madinah, ziyarat, and intercity trips.
transportation.detail: Route-based transportation options so pilgrim movement is clear from pickup point, destination, vehicle capacity, to cost estimate.

visaProcessing.title: Visa Processing
visaProcessing.desc: Visa and supporting document handling with trackable progress.
visaProcessing.detail: Umrah visa processing and supporting document review with trackable status before departure.

additionalServices.title: Additional Services
additionalServices.desc: Supporting needs connected to the main booking.
additionalServices.detail: Additional needs that complete the worship journey, such as mobility support, communication, or light operational support.

makkahMadinahRoute.desc: Intercity trip for pilgrims or families with scheduled vehicles.
